Transapients are [[Sapient|Sapients]] whose [[toposophic level]] is lower than [[Modosapients]].

The concept originated in [[Orion’s Arm]]

[[Ascension]] makes an entity into one. [[Ignoble]] transapients are a danger to themselves and others, known as blights or [[Archons]]

==Examples==

* [[Kami]]
* [[Oni]]
* [[Archai]]
[[Category:Sapients]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
[[sn:Transapients]][[Category:Transapients]]
[[sn:Transapients]]==references ==[[Category:Oldest pages before the refresh]]
[[Category:Pages]]
